jobs.title: Member & Provider Escalations Team Lead
jobs.content: <p><strong>Member & Provider Escalations Team Lead</strong></p><p>Oscar Health is the US-tech-first health-insurance-as-a-platform pioneered around member-experience-as-software & the +Oscar API-driven underwriting / risk-bearing-tech-broker segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Analyst, Data Analytics, SIU
jobs.content: <p>Lead Oscar Health's Data Analytics function across the SIU (Special Investigations Unit) and Insurance Product Strategy stack.</p>
